nutrition.title: Nutrizione
nutrition.setupRequiredHint: Set your daily nutrition targets first. Once saved, you can start logging meals and tracking intake against your goal.
nutrition.statsFormulaHint: We use the Mifflin–St Jeor formula with your weight, height, age, and sex to estimate daily calories.
nutrition.sexError: Select male or female for an accurate estimate.
nutrition.goalWeightHint: Slide to your target weight. We'll set cut or bulk automatically and adjust your daily calories.
nutrition.setGoalWeightError: Set a goal weight to continue.
nutrition.proteinHintCut: Protein is set high for muscle (2.2 g/kg). Fat fills ~25% of calories; carbs cover the rest.
nutrition.proteinHintBulk: Protein is set high for muscle (2.0 g/kg). Fat fills ~25% of calories; carbs cover the rest.
nutrition.noPlannedMeals: No planned meals yet. Add your own below, or ask your coach for a meal plan.
nutrition.noMealsLogged: Nothing logged yet. Tap "Add meal" to log what you eat.

coach.subtitle: Training, diet plans, and bodybuilding advice
coach.connectIntro: Armstrong Coach runs on Google Gemini Flash. Create a free API key at
coach.connectMiddle: , add NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY to .env.local, then restart the dev server.
coach.emptyCopy: Get a meal plan or gym split, tweak exercises, or ask bodybuilding questions. Tap Add to Nutrition or Add to workout days when you're ready — or keep chatting to adjust.
coach.applyCombinedWorkoutDaysExercise: Add to workout days & update exercise

coach.dietSaveError: That meal plan could not be saved. Ask the coach to try again.
coach.gymSaveError: That workout plan could not be applied. Ask the coach to try again.

applyWorkout.describeGym: Added your {{dayCount}}-day plan ({{exerciseCount}} exercises) — {{dayNames}}. Open the Workouts tab to start training.

errors.overloaded: Gemini is busy right now (high demand). Wait 10–20 seconds and send again — the app will auto-retry and switch to a backup model.
errors.zeroQuota: Free-tier quota is not active on your Google project. In Google AI Studio, open your project → Set up billing (free tier still costs $0). Then retry, or wait if you hit daily limits.
errors.rateLimitSeconds: Rate limit hit. Wait about {{seconds}}s and try again. Free tier has daily/minute caps.
errors.rateLimit: Rate limit hit on the free tier. Wait a minute and try again.
errors.invalidKey: Invalid API key. Check NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.local.
errors.modelNotFound: That Gemini model is no longer available. Remove NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_MODEL from .env.local or set it to gemini-3.5-flash, then restart the dev server.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: Choose how you want to start. Armstrong works offline — sign in later to sync.
welcome.makePlanTitle: Armstrong, make a diet and exercise plan
welcome.makePlanCopy: Answer a few questions and we will build your split, meals, and macros.
welcome.havePlanCopy: Jump straight into the app with the default workout days and nutrition tracking.
welcome.statsCopy: Weight, height, age, and sex shape your calorie targets and training volume.
welcome.goalCopy: Set your goal weight — we'll figure out cut or bulk from there and match your training to your level.
welcome.programCopy: Choose how often you train, what you are optimizing for, and what equipment you have.
welcome.timelineCopy: At about {{weeklyRate}} kg per week of {{goalLabel}}, you could reach roughly {{targetChange}} kg of change in about {{weeks}} weeks with consistent training and nutrition.
welcome.timelineHint: This is an estimate based on your stats and experience — real results vary with sleep, adherence, and recovery.
welcome.experienceAmateur: New to tracking — simpler meals, machines, and full-body basics.
welcome.experienceIntermediate: Consistent training — balanced splits and structured macros.
welcome.experienceAdvanced: Years in the gym — higher volume, compound focus, meal timing.
welcome.experiencePro: Competition-ready — peak volume, weak-point work, precision nutrition.

navigation.footerCopy: © {{year}} Armstrong. Free AI fitness coach for bodybuilders who train with intent.

hero.headline: One Sentence. Full Plan. Zero Cost.
hero.subhead: Tell Armstrong your goal — lean bulk, cut, 4-day split — and get a pro-grade training and nutrition plan instantly. Track every macro, log every PR, and chat with your AI fitness coach 24/7.
hero.ctaHint: Type one sentence about your goal — full workout & meal plan in minutes.

diet.title: Free Diet Planner
diet.description: Enter your stats and goal to get daily calories, protein, carbs, fats, and a full four-meal day — no signup.

gym.title: Free Gym Planner
gym.description: Pick days per week, equipment, and experience level. Get a complete workout split with sets, reps, and rest.

01.title: Type Your Goal
01.copy: Drop one sentence: “I want to lean bulk and only have 4 days a week.” That’s it — no forms, no fluff.

02.title: Get Your Instant Plan
02.copy: Armstrong builds your custom split, exercises, sets, and a free bodybuilding meal plan with precise macros — ready before your next session.

03.title: Crush It with Your AI Coach
03.copy: Log sets, hit PRs, track nutrition daily, and ask your 24/7 AI strength coach anything — right from your pocket.

features.heading: Your Free AI Fitness Coach, Meal Plan & Macro Tracker

generator.title: The One-Sentence Plan Generator
generator.copy: Skip the spreadsheet. Describe your physique goal, schedule, and equipment — Armstrong’s AI workout generator delivers a complete, periodized program built for bodybuilders.

nutrition.title: Smart Nutrition Calculator & Tracker
nutrition.copy: Dial in protein, carbs, and fats with a smart nutrition calculator that adapts to your training. Log meals daily and stay locked on your targets without a separate app.

coach.title: The 24/7 AI Strength Coach
coach.copy: Swap, progress, or deload — your AI fitness coach reads your logs and answers in real time. Unlimited guidance without the premium price tag of a human coach.

risk.headline: Explore Everything. Pay Nothing.
risk.copy: Test the full app — custom plans, macro tracking, AI coaching, workout logging — completely free. No credit card, no trial countdown, no paywall surprises.

bullets.plans: Free instant workout & meal plan generation

faq.srOnly: Frequently asked questions about Armstrong AI fitness coach

free.question: Is Armstrong really free to use?
free.answer: Yes. You can explore the entire app — generate plans, track macros, log workouts, and chat with the AI coach — without paying or entering a credit card.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the AI fitness coach?
accuracy.answer: Armstrong analyzes your actual training logs, PRs, and nutrition data to give personalized recommendations — not generic templates. It adapts as you progress session by session.

macros.question: Can I track my macros and nutrition daily?
macros.answer: Absolutely. Armstrong includes a smart nutrition calculator and daily food tracker so you can hit protein, carbs, and fat targets alongside your training plan.

generator.question: How does the one-sentence workout generator work?
generator.answer: Describe your goal in plain English — goal, days per week, experience level, equipment. Armstrong’s AI builds a complete training split and meal plan tailored to your input in minutes.

humanCoach.question: Do I still need a human coach?
humanCoach.answer: Armstrong gives you 24/7 AI coaching, plan customization, and precision tracking at no cost. Many lifters use it as their primary coach; others pair it with occasional human check-ins.

footerCta.headline: Your Free AI Fitness Coach Is Ready
footerCta.copy: Generate your custom bodybuilding plan in one sentence. Start tracking macros and crushing PRs today.

hero.headline: A Gym Split Built for Your Level
hero.subhead: Pick your days, goal, and equipment. Slide from amateur to pro and get a full weekly program — exercises, sets, reps, and rest — scaled to how you actually train.

about.title: How the free gym planner works
about.copy: Choose your training days, goal, and equipment. Three days defaults to full body, four to upper/lower, five to push/pull/legs plus upper/lower, and six to a double PPL rotation. Weekly volume, rest periods, and exercise complexity scale with the amateur-to-pro slider — so beginners get fewer movements and pros get higher set counts.

preview.label: Live split preview
preview.hint: Generate to unlock full exercise lists with sets, reps, and rest.

cta.headline: Execute Your Split in Armstrong
cta.copy: Log sets, track PRs, and sync your plan to the cloud — free, no credit card. Need macros too? <0>Try the free diet planner</0>.

split.question: How does the gym planner choose my split?
split.answer: Three days defaults to full body, four to upper/lower, five to PPL plus upper/lower, and six to a double PPL rotation. Volume and exercise count scale with your experience tier.

slider.question: What is the amateur-to-pro slider?
slider.answer: It adjusts weekly volume, rest periods, and exercise complexity. Amateurs get fewer movements and longer rest; pros get higher set counts and advanced progression notes.

home.question: Can I train at home with this plan?
home.answer: Select home equipment and exercises swap to dumbbells, bands, and bodyweight alternatives while keeping the same split structure.

track.question: How do I track this plan in Armstrong?
track.answer: Open the app to log sets, hit PRs, and sync your plan to the cloud. The planner gives you the blueprint — the app is where you execute it.

hero.headline: Your Macro Meal Plan in 60 Seconds
hero.subhead: Enter your stats, slide from amateur to pro, and get a full day of meals with calories, protein, carbs, and fats — built from proven formulas.

about.title: How the free diet planner works
about.copy: Armstrong uses the Mifflin–St Jeor equation for basal metabolic rate, applies a training activity factor, then sets protein, fat, and carbs for a lean bulk or cut. Meals are scaled to hit those targets with four structured slots per day. Slide the experience bar from amateur to pro for tighter meal-prep guidance and higher protein density.

preview.label: Live macro preview
preview.hint: Finish the steps to unlock your full four-meal day with foods and tips.

cta.headline: Log Every Macro in Armstrong
cta.copy: Your plan is the start. The app tracks meals, PRs, and progress — free, no credit card. Need a workout split too? <0>Try the free gym planner</0>.

calculation.question: How is my diet plan calculated?
calculation.answer: Armstrong uses the Mifflin–St Jeor equation for basal metabolic rate, applies a training activity factor, then sets protein, fat, and carbs for bulk or cut. Meals are scaled to hit those targets.

tiers.question: What changes between amateur and pro tiers?
tiers.answer: Higher tiers add protein density, meal-prep precision, and timing tips. Amateur plans favor simple repeatable meals; pro plans assume you weigh and log every ingredient.

app.question: Can I use this meal plan in the Armstrong app?
app.answer: Yes. Open the app to log these meals daily, track macros against your targets, and adjust as you progress.

medical.question: Is this a medical nutrition plan?
medical.answer: No. This is general fitness guidance. Consult a registered dietitian for medical conditions, eating disorders, or clinical needs.

gymFinder.headline: Find a gym near you
gymFinder.subhead: Search by your location or a zip code to see nearby gyms, how far they are, and how to reach them. Then track every workout free in Armstrong.

cta.headline: Found your gym? Track it in Armstrong
cta.copy: Log sets, track PRs, build your split, and sync to the cloud — free, no credit card.

batch.plainLanguageHint: Type your whole program in plain language — sets, reps, weight, rest, holds. Armstrong uses AI to turn it into exercises for this day.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: How Armstrong collects, uses, stores, and protects your data.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Armstrong ("Armstrong", "we", "us") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our web app, mobile apps, and related services (the "Service"). By using the Service you agree to this policy.

noAccount.heading: 1. Data you can use without an account
noAccount.body: Armstrong works without signing in. In that mode your workouts, diet logs, and settings are stored only on your device (browser localStorage or app storage) and are not sent to us.

collect.heading: 2. Information we collect
collect.itemAccount: Account information: your email address. If you sign in with email/password, we store a securely hashed password (bcrypt). If you sign in with Google or Apple, we receive your verified email and a stable provider identifier; we never receive your provider password.
collect.itemFitness: Fitness data you create: workouts, exercises, sets, weights, reps, sessions, diet/food logs, nutrition profile, and your chats with the AI coach.
collect.itemTechnical: Technical data: basic, largely anonymous usage and performance metrics to keep the Service reliable.
collect.footer: When you are signed in, the fitness data above is synced to your account so you can access it across devices.

use.heading: 3. How we use your information
use.itemSync: Provide, sync, and secure your account and fitness data.
use.itemAi: Generate AI coaching, workout, and diet suggestions you request.
use.itemOperate: Operate, maintain, and improve the Service.
use.footer: We do not sell your personal information.

storage.heading: 4. Where your data is stored
storage.body: Account and synced fitness data are stored in our backend database (PostgreSQL) hosted by our infrastructure providers. Data is transmitted over encrypted connections (HTTPS) and passwords are stored only as one-way hashes.

thirdParty.heading: 5. Third-party services
thirdParty.intro: We share the minimum data needed with service providers that help run the Service:
thirdParty.itemGemini: Google (Gemini) — when you use the AI coach, your chat messages and relevant plan context are sent to Google to generate responses.
thirdParty.itemUsda: USDA FoodData Central — food search queries you enter.
thirdParty.itemHosting: Hosting & analytics providers — to serve the app and measure anonymous performance/usage.
thirdParty.footer: These providers process data under their own privacy policies. We do not control, and are not responsible for, their practices.

cookies.heading: 6. Cookies and local storage
cookies.body: We use your browser's local storage to keep you signed in (an authentication token) and to hold your app data. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.

choices.heading: 7. Your choices and rights
choices.itemAccess: Access & update: view and edit your data directly in the app.
choices.itemDelete: Delete: the "Clear all data" action in your profile permanently deletes your data from this device and your cloud account. You may also contact us to delete your account.
choices.itemRights: Depending on your location, you may have additional rights (access, correction, deletion, portability). Contact us to exercise them.

retention.heading: 8. Data retention
retention.body: We keep your account data while your account is active. When you delete your data or account, we remove it from our systems, except where retention is required by law.

children.heading: 9. Children
children.body: The Service is not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect their data.

changes.heading: 10. Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this policy. Material changes will be reflected by the "Last updated" date above; continued use means you accept the updated policy.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: The terms that govern your use of Armstrong.
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of Armstrong (the "Service"). By accessing or using the Service, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

eligibility.heading: 1. Eligibility
eligibility.body: You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum age in your jurisdiction) and able to form a binding contract to use the Service.

account.heading: 2. Your account
account.body: You are responsible for activity under your account and for keeping your credentials secure. Provide accurate information and notify us of any unauthorized use.

health.heading: 3. Health & fitness disclaimer
health.body: Armstrong provides general fitness and nutrition information, including AI-generated workout and diet suggestions. It is not medical advice and is not a substitute for professional guidance. Consult a qualified physician or professional before starting any exercise or nutrition program. You use the Service and follow any suggestions at your own risk. AI output may be inaccurate or incomplete — use your judgment.

acceptableUse.heading: 4. Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemUnlawful: Use the Service unlawfully or to harm others.
acceptableUse.itemAbuse: Attempt to access other users' data, disrupt, reverse-engineer, or abuse the Service or its rate limits.
acceptableUse.itemContent: Upload content you do not have the right to use.

content.heading: 5. Your content
content.body: You retain ownership of the data you create (workouts, logs, chats). You grant us a limited license to store and process it solely to operate the Service for you, as described in our <0>Privacy Policy</0>.

ip.heading: 6. Intellectual property
ip.body: The Service, including its software, design, and content (excluding your data and third-party content), is owned by Armstrong and protected by applicable laws. We grant you a personal, non-transferable, revocable license to use it.

thirdParty.heading: 7. Third-party services
thirdParty.body: The Service integrates third parties (e.g. Google, Apple, USDA). Your use of those features may be subject to their terms, and we are not responsible for them.

disclaimers.heading: 8. Disclaimers
disclaimers.body: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We do not warrant the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure.

liability.heading: 9. Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Armstrong will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for any loss of data, arising from your use of the Service.

termination.heading: 10. Termination
termination.body: You may stop using the Service and delete your data at any time. We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these Terms or to protect the Service.

changes.heading: 11. Changes
changes.body: We may update these Terms. Material changes are indicated by the "Last updated" date above; continued use means you accept the updated Terms.
